lines.target: Men speak* of women as the “ fair sex ” or the “ gentle sex ” or the “ weaker sex ”'.
lines.base: Los hombres hablan de las mujeres como del « bello sexo » o el « sexo dulce » o el « sexo débil » (sexo más débil).
lines.pronunciation: .. spiik... uimén... dchentél. uiiké... — 2 ... reárli... — 3 ... kónsi dérd... — 4 ... driims... — 5 ... taim.

lines.target: Women rarely speak* of men as the “ stronger sex”.
lines.base: Las mujeres rara vez hablan de [los] hombres como del « sexo fuerte » (sexo más fuerte).

lines.target: Some men think* they are considered as the “ paying sex”.
lines.base: Algunos hombres piensan que se les considera el « sexo que paga ».

lines.target: My wife dreams every night that she's married to a millionaire.
lines.base: Mi mujer sueña cada noche que está casada con un millonario.

lines.target: You're lucky. Mine dreams she's married to a millionaire in the daytime!
lines.base: Tienes suerte. [La] mía sueña que está casada con un millonario durante el día.

gap_candidates.target: Men speak* of women as the “ fair sex ” or the “ gentle sex ” or the “ weaker sex ”'.
Women rarely speak* of men as the “ stronger sex”.
Some men think* they are considered as the “ paying sex”.
My wife dreams every night that she's married to a millionaire.
You're lucky. Mine dreams she's married to a millionaire in the daytime! (1)
